title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Straw hat Luffy" is a man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A few hours earlier before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This man took their promise to heart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who will eventually change the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may still be a bit wet behind the ears... but I sincerely believe that the one who will rule the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am... weak!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will not be any of the four yonko... but "straw hat Luffy" himself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would like to aid this man in his endeavors !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish to board his ship and sacrifice this life of mine for him if need be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I assume that these actions will, in the end, result in a fight for the true freedom for the fishman race as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Over these past two years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've uttered the name of Luffy countless times...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If your passion and trust in this man is honest and just...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not see any reason why you should not turn your words into actions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: O... oh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have I really been talk- ing about him that often?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fufu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Go and follow your aspirations, jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You guys... Really okay with this...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: captain, why would anyone of us complain?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you, a former officer in Neptune's army, traded that in for the life of a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Simply for the opportunity to fight alongside ex-marijois slaves like us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, you only accepted the promotion to Shichibukai in order to elevate the status of us fishmen as a whole to the entire world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and we know your reasons for joining big mom as one of her subordinate crews...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was not only to protect all of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But protect our kingdom using her name!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain, you've always made decisions in your life based on how it would benefit those around you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You no longer need to carry that burden, jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hear, hear!! Please think about your- self for once, jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: From this point forward...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay to follow your own desires and be a bit selfish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go on jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can manage perfectly fine ourselves, so don't you worry about us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I have no words for how grateful I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...In any case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even if we all support his decision,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt big mom will let him off the hook so easily...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Worse case scenario, if her rage gets directed towards us, all we gotta do is run for our lives!! Bwahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....but won't this put aladine in an awkward situation?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, since he's tied the knot with Miss Prairie and is now a member of Big Mom's immediate family and all...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
